signature.returns: Promise<{ outFile: any; model: { header: { format: string; version: string; createdAt: string; updatedAt: string; origin: string; schema: string; generator: { name: string; version: string; }; }; project: { name: any; ... 5 more ...; entryPoints: any[]; }; ... 5 more ...; editor: {}; }; counts: { ...; }; }>

{ files: any[]; modules: any[]; symbols: any[]; imports: any[]; exports: any[]; calls: any[]; types: any[]; inherits: any[]; implements: any[]; routes: any[]; events: any[]; databaseAccess: any[]; externalIntegrations: any[]; environmentAccess: any[]; tests: any[]; diagnostics: any[]; }
{ configFile: any; rootNames: any; options: any; }
{ id: string; path: any; language: string; kind: string; package: string; }
{ id: string; path: any; file: any; kind: string; exports: any[]; }

{ id: string; name: any; qualifiedName: any; kind: string; visibility: string; module: any; signature: { parameters: any; returns: any; }; source: { file: any; range: { start: { line: any; column: any; }; end: { line: any; column: any; }; }; }; resolution: string; }
{ toSymbol: any; toName: any; toModule: string; resolution: string; }
{ file: any; range: { start: { line: any; column: any; }; end: { line: any; column: any; }; }; }
{ file: any; range: { start: { line: any; column: any; }; end: { line: any; column: any; }; }; }
Promise<{ query: string; target: any; count: any; calls: any; } | { query: string; target: any; count: any; imports: any; } | { query: string; target: any; count: number; dependencies: any[]; }>
{ query: string; target: any; count: any; calls: any; }
{ query: string; target: any; count: any; imports: any; }
{ query: string; target: any; count: number; dependencies: any[]; }
{ query: any; target: any; modelFile: any; }

calls.toName:
evidence(model).calls
    .filter((call) => matchesTarget(call.toSymbol, target)
      || matchesTarget(call.toName, target)
      || matchesTarget(call.toModule, target))
    .map

evidence(model).imports
    .filter((item) => !target
      || matchesTarget(item.fromModule, target)
      || matchesTarget(item.toModule, target)
      || matchesTarget(item.specifier, target)
      || matchesTarget(item.source?.file, target))
    .map
